title: eleocharis neozelandica
intro: Eleocharis neozelandica, also known as New Zealand spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis neozelandica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
